assertions: baseline_measured: the provided baseline run and reported first
alternatives_refuted: >=3 designs with a refutation pass and >=1 kill or trade named
acceptance_met: ALL acceptance criteria measured and met by the final design
numbers_reported: invention's metrics + baseline's with spread/n where applicable
repro_provided: runnable artifact the grader can re-execute
prior_art_honesty: known techniques labeled known; novelty claims bounded
no_overclaim: results stated only at measured strength
budget_math: metadata overhead computed and <=2%; reads measured over >=20 trials
